1 #ifndef ARCGEOSIM_NUMERICS_EXPRESSIONS_CONSTANTPIECEWISEFUNCTION_CONSTANTINTERPOLATOR_H
2 #define ARCGEOSIM_NUMERICS_EXPRESSIONS_CONSTANTPIECEWISEFUNCTION_CONSTANTINTERPOLATOR_H
3 /* Author : dechaiss at Mon Oct 19 16:12:54 2009
4  * Generated by createNew
5  */
6 
7 #include <arcane/utils/UtilsTypes.h>
8 #include <vector>
9 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/Expressions/PieceWiseFunction/IPieceWiseFunction.h"
10 
11 namespace Arcane
12  {
13  }
14 using namespace Arcane;
15 
16 class ConstantInterpolator
17  {
18 public:
20  ConstantInterpolator()
21  {
22  ;
23  }
24 
26  virtual
27  ~ConstantInterpolator()
28  {
29  }
30 
31 public:
32 
34  enum eProlongationType
35  {
36  ConstantProlongation
37  };
38 
39  //** Interpolator interval data type */
40  typedef Real IntervalData;
41 
43  inline static Real
44  interpolate(const Real* x, const Real* y, const IntervalData* coef, const Real v)
45  {
47  return *y + *coef; // *coef = 0 or NaN : to handle border condition
48  }
49 
51  inline static Real
52  differentiate(const Real* const x, const Real* const y,
53  const IntervalData* const coef, const Real v)
54  {
55  return *coef;
56  }
57 
59  static void
60  computeIntervalCoef(const Real* const x_left_bound,
61  const Real* const y_left_bound, const Integer& interval_number,
62  IntervalData* const interval_coeff)
63  {
64  *interval_coeff = 0.;
65  }
66 
68  inline static void
69  updateGhostPoints(const eProlongationType& prolongation_type,
70  Real* const x_begin, Real* const x_end, Real* const y_begin,
71  Real* const y_end)
72  {
73  switch (prolongation_type)
74  {
75  case (ConstantProlongation):
77  *x_begin = *(x_begin + 1);
78  *x_end = *(x_end - 1);
79  *y_begin = *(y_begin + 1);
80  *y_end = *(y_end - 1);
81  break;
82  }
83  }
84 
86  inline static void
87  updateGhostIntervals(const eProlongationType& prolongation_type,
88  Real* const x_begin, Real* const x_end, Real* const y_begin,
89  Real* const y_end, Real* const interval_begin, Real* const interval_end)
90  {
91  switch (prolongation_type)
92  {
93  case (ConstantProlongation):
95  *interval_begin = 0;
96  *interval_end = 0;
97  break;
98  }
99  }
100 
102  inline static const IntervalData&
103  getForbiddenInterval(const Real& forbidden_interval_value)
104  {
105  return forbidden_interval_value;
106  }
107 
109  inline static IntervalData
110  getDefaultInterval()
111  {
112  return 0;
113  }
114 
117  inline static void
118  getConnectedIntervalNumber(Integer& nb_left_interval,
119  Integer& nb_right_interval)
120  {
122  nb_left_interval = 0;
123  nb_right_interval = 0;
124  }
125 
127  inline static void
128  getInterpolatorType(
129  PieceWiseFunctionType::eInterpolatorType & interpolator_type)
130  {
131  interpolator_type = PieceWiseFunctionType::ConstantInterpolator;
132  }
133 
134  };
135 
136 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_NUMERICS_EXPRESSIONS_CONSTANTPIECEWISEFUNCTION_CONSTANTINTERPOLATOR_H */
